windows-server._comment_hostname_patterns: Glob patterns matched against socket.gethostname() to auto-detect this agent
windows-server._comment_platform: Either 'windows' or 'linux' — determines path normalization and runner commands
windows-server._comment_claude_path: Absolute path to the Claude CLI binary on this node
windows-server._comment_python_path: Python interpreter used to run the runner script on this node
windows-server._comment_exchange_root: Root directory for the exchange filesystem (used for archive path)
windows-server._comment_job_root: Directory where job folders are created and looked up
windows-server._comment_ssh_from: SSH host alias to reach this agent from another agent. null = same machine (e.g. local WSL)
windows-server._comment_relay_via: If direct SSH fails, relay through this agent. null = no fallback relay
windows-server._comment_capabilities: Tags describing what this node can do (informational, stored in job metadata)

linux-server._comment_ssh_from_null: null means shared filesystem (e.g. WSL on the same machine as windows-server)
linux-server._comment_relay_via_example: If direct SSH from the caller fails, fall back to routing via this agent
linux-server._comment_wsl_distro: WSL distribution name — only needed when ssh_from value is null (local WSL access)
